name: Salt Provider
description: Root or scoped context provider for Salt theme, mode, density, breakpoints, and style injection behavior.

theme.description: Custom theme class name(s) to apply, similar to className. Multiple names are supported.

mode.description: Color mode applied to nested Salt components.

density.description: Density scale controlling size/spacing characteristics for nested components.

breakpoints.description: Custom responsive breakpoints used by Salt responsive hooks and layout behavior.

applyClassesTo.default: root for root provider, scope for nested providers
applyClassesTo.description: Controls where Salt classes and data attributes are applied.

children.description: Nested content that consumes Salt context values.

slots.default: Provider children that inherit theme/mode/density/breakpoint context.

keyboard: No direct keyboard interaction; provider is contextual
aria: No component-specific accessibility guidance is defined
Ensure nested interactive components remain accessible under selected theme/mode/density
